What's going on everyone? So someone hit the goal and asked for refund despite all the things that we have done to try and provide service. It happens. Here are some easy things that you can ask them to do, not require them to legally, but you can ask them and 99 times out of 100 they're happy to do it. So first thing you want to do is ask them to write a review on Yelp, Facebook and Google and screenshot it and send it to you. Why do we do that? And whenever I explain this to someone like listen I just trained you for six weeks for free. We helped you with your form, I helped you with your food, all of that people time I came out of pocket plus the marketing to get you in here. So my only request here is that like can you at least leave us a review of your experiences. That's unfair. And most people are like oh absolutely not a problem you know what I mean and they'll leave you with you. So like cool. If you can send that to me, here that would be fantastic. And so I asked them to do it right there on the spot because it's faster and then you just have them there and it's like just do it now that way you're done you'll have to think about it. Just email it to me with your name as a subhead and that way you have a time and dave stamp of that action. And if you can you know do a Facebook post four and a half after. Just post on your page that would be amazing and you can tag me in it so that I can see it because it just inspires the rest of the group. If you want you can tag it you can do inside the group as well. So these are the things that I would always ask at the end and then I would always say like what service did we not provide that we would have needed to in order to keep your business. Just like for us like what did we not do. And sometimes you'll get people to just basically be like there's nothing you could have done like I suck. And when that happens like they're going to say that and then they're going to feel guilty. And so a lot of times asking them to do this is not a very hard thing. But I do I would implore you to ask them to do it right there and then it just makes it easier for everyone. Yeah I mean there's there's never any requirements for that for that. You know but if they accepted the original challenge proposition you know they can they can say that they're not satisfied and you would give them a refund. Anyways but if they completed the challenge successfully most people if you just say hey can you do this before I sent you that would be fantastic. Either way you're going to you know be obligated to send it to them but if you can just ask them kindly most people are happy to do it. So here's a nice way to at least make get some positive reviews get some testimonials that you can use for later marketing materials. And so just a little thing that you can tack on at the end once you've gone through all of the normal processes.
